MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ATLAS DIAMOND COMPANY INC. MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER filed by defendant Joseph F. Rosa, Jr. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted with leave to amend to file verified answer. See CCP section 431.30(d). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
